description_long: This stereo sound system consists of three black rectangular speaker units, with the largest unit featuring a prominent circular woofer and two smaller satellite speakers each with a single midrange driver. The front faces of the speakers are finished in a glossy black, with the drivers surrounded by a gold or yellowish ring, giving a modern and professional appearance. The largest speaker has a visible brand logo on the front, reading 'KRK', and a small port or control at the lower right. The sides and backs of the units are plain, with no visible controls, ports, or grilles. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for use in urban environments such as studios, garages, or entertainment spaces. The speakers appear to be constructed primarily from plastic or composite material, with metal and fabric elements likely present in the drivers.
description: A sleek, black stereo sound system with three rectangular speakers, gold-ringed drivers, and a visible 'KRK' logo on the main unit. The design is modern and professional, with glossy surfaces and minimal external features.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three speakers, with visible gold-ringed drivers and the 'KRK' logo on the main unit.
description_view_1: Side view showing the plain, glossy black sides of the stacked speakers, with no visible drivers or controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black backs of the speakers, with no visible ports, grilles, or branding.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view highlighting the rectangular shapes and glossy surfaces, with only the edges of the drivers partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular 'KRK' logo in white and yellow, located on the front of the largest speaker unit.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: No visible grille; speaker drivers are exposed with a smooth, circular gold ring around the cone.
attribute_control_panel_layout: None visible; no buttons, knobs, or sliders are apparent on any view.
